title: nexus.secrets.bundle public manifest (v1alpha1)
description: PUBLIC manifest of an encrypted, single-use secrets bundle. TARGET-STATE contract. This schema describes ONLY metadata about the bundle. It MUST NOT contain any secret value, ciphertext payload, or plaintext key material. Secret values are encrypted client-side to the instance public key and travel out of band. See ADR-0005.

recipient.description: Instance the bundle was encrypted for. The Hub never holds the private key.

encryption.description: Approved envelope encryption (ADR-0005): age with X25519 recipients. age is ENCRYPTION ONLY and is never used to sign anything. The manifest describes the recipient; the actual ciphertext travels out of band and never appears here.

scheme.description: age/X25519 envelope encryption. Fixed for v1alpha1.

age_recipient.description: Public X25519 recipient the bundle is encrypted to (the instance's public key). No private key ever reaches the Hub.

entries.description: Descriptors of what the bundle carries. Names and target services only; NEVER values.

ref_name.description: Logical reference name (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). A NAME, not a value.

expires_at.description: Short expiry. After import or expiry the bundle is invalidated and deleted.
